The [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] '''Imperial Armored Transport''' was fifty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and carried ten crewmen and twenty [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]

==Characteristics==
The Imperial Armored Transport was armed with two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], and had a Class Two [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] with a Class Twelve back-up. The ship could transport at least 30,000 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] and 3 [[Standard month/Legends|months]] worth of [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]].<ref name="PP" /> Some vessels, such as the [[Elusive (transport)|''Elusive'']] and ''[[Timely]]'', were armed with two laser cannons, and four double [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries.<ref name="SH" />

==History==
An early concept of the [[Star Galleon-class frigate|''Star Galleon''-class frigate]], the Imperial Armored Transport was used primarily as a system to system support ship.<ref name="PP" /> Two Imperial Armored Transports were used to remove debris from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Dankayo Base|base]] on [[Dankayo/Legends|Dankayo]]. The ships were named [[Elusive (transport)|''Elusive'']] and ''[[Timely]]''. The ''Elusive'' was later modified with an external rack carrying six [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]].<ref name="SH" />

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]
